name: O-7 (SS-68)
events: 2 Aug 1942 USS O-7 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
3 Aug 1942 USS O-7 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
5 Sep 1942 USS O-7 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
6 Sep 1942 USS O-7 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
24 Jan 1943 USS O-7 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
26 Jan 1943 USS O-7 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
5 Feb 1943 USS O-7 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
6 Feb 1943 USS O-7 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
21 Jun 1945 USS O-7 departed New London, Connecticut for the Philadelphia Navy Yard for decommissioning.
22 Jun 1945 USS O-7 arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for decommissioning.
